description: Whether MCP resources (not just tools) can be accessed, typically via @-mention syntax or similar referencing mechanisms.

amp.mechanism: Amp does not document MCP resource referencing

claude-code.mechanism: mcp_resources: MCP resources accessible via @server:protocol://path syntax; appear in @ autocomplete; auto-fetched when referenced

cline.mechanism: Cline does not document @-mention or equivalent access to MCP resources

codex.mechanism: Codex does not document MCP resource referencing

copilot-cli.mechanism: Copilot CLI does not document MCP resource referencing

crush.mechanism: MCP resource referencing (as distinct from tool calls) not documented in Crush

cursor.mechanism: Cursor's MCP documentation does not describe referencing MCP resources by URI.

factory-droid.mechanism: no @-mention or resource referencing syntax for MCP resources documented

gemini-cli.mechanism: resource_referencing: Gemini CLI supports accessing MCP resources in addition to tools

kiro.mechanism: Kiro does not document MCP resource referencing

roo-code.mechanism: MCP resource referencing is not documented as a first-class feature in Roo Code

windsurf.mechanism: Windsurf does not document @-mention or equivalent access to MCP resources

zed.mechanism: MCP resource referencing via @-style syntax is not documented
